TriggerOnAttack.Name: Trigger on Attack Rolls
TriggerOnAttack.Hint: Play animations when an attack roll chat message is created.

TriggerOnSkill.Name: Trigger on Skill Rolls
TriggerOnSkill.Hint: Play animations when a skill (non-attack) roll chat message is created. Only fires if the skill item has AA flags configured.

RequireSuccess.Name: Attacks: Require Net Success
RequireSuccess.Hint: When enabled, attack animations only play if the roll has at least 1 net success. When disabled, animations always play on an attack roll.

Debug.Name: Debug Logging
Debug.Hint: Log detailed information to the browser console to help diagnose issues.

Notifications.AANotFound: Automated Animations – Genesys Support: Automated Animations module not found or not active. This module requires Automated Animations to function.
Notifications.GenesysNotFound: Automated Animations – Genesys Support: Genesys system not detected. This module only works with the Genesys system.
